title: Crumbly Uruguayan Almond Ceviche
description: A floral, low‑carb ceviche featuring fresh tuna coated in almond flour, marinated in white vinegar and lime, and finished with pickled onion for a subtle crunch.
instructions: Pat the tuna steaks dry and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Coat each slice evenly with almond flour, tapping off excess.
In a shallow bowl, whisk together white vinegar, lime juice, olive oil, and a pinch of salt.
Place the almond‑coated tuna slices into the bowl, ensuring they are submerged; cover and refrigerate for 10 minutes to marinate.
Remove the tuna from the vinegar bath and pat dry again.
Arrange the tuna slices on a chilled plate, sprinkle with diced pickled onion and chopped parsley.
Mildly stir the entire assembly to distribute the flavors; rest for an additional 5 minutes in the fridge.
Serve cold, optionally alongside a fresh salad of mixed greens for a crisp finish.
